use_cases: Grouping action buttons in toolbars with unified border styling
Creating segmented controls for filtering or view switching
Building toggle button groups for multi-select options
Organizing form actions with connected primary and secondary buttons
Creating tab-like navigation patterns with visual grouping
ai_summary: A Shadcn/ui button group component that clusters multiple buttons or interactive elements with intelligent shared borders, removing redundant borders between adjacent items to create a unified appearance. Supports horizontal and vertical orientations with CSS-driven border manipulation. Uses Radix UI Slot for composition flexibility and includes text and separator sub-components for versatile layouts.
